name: mvs-manager
description: MVS Field Trips — React SPA with Express/SQLite backend

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix web install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix web run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix backend start" "npm --prefix web run dev"
